name: Vicinity Centres
analysis: VCX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.5325. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$2.5457 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$2.5325, stop A$2.3760, target A$2.6000. Risk/reward is 0.43:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
